title: heteropterys campestris
intro: Heteropterys campestris, also known as Pau' Amarillo, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the family Malpighiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Heteropterys campestris include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema, and providing relief from digestive issues like diarrhea and stomach pain. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
